content:
# Overall Project Summary (May 2, 2026)

The project focused heavily on infrastructure stabilization today, specifically resolving critical build compatibility issues across multiple plugins to ensure alignment with the ESM-only `@elizaos/core` framework. Simultaneously, the core team addressed runtime stability for headless environments and initiated critical fixes for Telegram integration and environment variable configuration.

## 🚨 Needs Attention
- **Telegram Integration Bugs**: Multiple issues ([elizaos/eliza#7240](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7240), [#7241](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7241), [#7245](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7245)) regarding token passing, Bun runtime errors, and race conditions require investigation to restore stable Telegram bot functionality.
- **Architecture/Auth Bugs**: Prototype fragmentation in `MiladyClient` ([elizaos/eliza#7233](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7233), [#7244](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7244)) and outdated `auth.json` schema expectations ([elizaos/eliza#7238](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7238), [#7243](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7243)) need developer input to resolve authentication failures.
- **Discord Configuration**: A discrepancy between `voice.ts` and `messages.ts` regarding environment variable handling ([elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord#49](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/49)) requires a decision on the standard implementation path.

## ✅ Completed Work

### Build System & ESM Compatibility
*   **Plugin ESM Alignment**: Resolved critical build failures across `plugin-ollama` ([#24](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama/pull/24)), `plugin-openai` ([#25](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-openai/pull/25)), `plugin-openrouter` ([#26](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-openrouter/pull/26)), and `plugin-pdf` ([#9](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-pdf/pull/9)) by removing incompatible CJS bundles.

### API Migration & Runtime Stability
*   **Jupiter API Migration**: Successfully migrated `plugin-jupiter` to the `api.jup.ag` endpoint with mandatory API key authentication to ensure service continuity ([elizaos-plugins/plugin-jupiter#4](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-jupiter/pull/4)).
*   **Headless Runtime Fixes**: Resolved a process-level segfault on headless Linux servers by bypassing the OS keychain when D-Bus is unavailable ([elizaos/eliza#7230](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7230)).
*   **CI/CD Improvements**: Updated CI smoke tests to handle non-zero exit codes on Windows Server 2025 ([elizaos/eliza#7232](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7232)).

### Dependency & Tooling Maintenance
*   **Core Upgrades**: Performed routine maintenance including upgrading `viem` to v2.48.8 ([elizaos/eliza#7237](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7237)), `tsdown` to ^0.21.0 ([elizaos/eliza#7236](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7236)), and Node.js to v24 ([elizaos/eliza#7239](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7239)).

## 🏗️ Work in Progress

### New Pull Requests
*   **elizaos/eliza**: [#7235](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7235) (Cloud/Plugin structure updates).
*   **elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord**: [#50](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/pull/50) (Standardizing `DISCORD_AUTO_REPLY` environment variable).
*   **elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram**: [#29](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram/pull/29) (Applying Telegram setup token at runtime).

## 🐞 Issue Triage

### New Issues
*   **elizaos/eliza**:
    *   [#7240](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7240): Telegram bot token bridge failure.
    *   [#7241](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7241): Bun runtime error on `bot.launch()`.
    *   [#7245](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7245): Telegram dual-polling race condition.
    *   [#7233](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7233) / [#7244](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7244): `MiladyClient` prototype fragmentation.
    *   [#7238](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7238) / [#7243](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7243): `hasCodexCliSubscriptionAuth` failures.
    *   [#7231](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7231): Headless Linux segfault documentation.
*   **elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord**:
    *   [#49](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/49): Configuration inconsistency in `voice.ts`.
